message:
feat(beads): add comprehensive crypto test bead (bd-1ezv)

- Created TEST: fcp-crypto Unit Tests bead
- Covers COSE_Sign1 roundtrip, signature verification, RFC8152 vectors
- Covers Ed25519 with Wycheproof test vectors
- Covers AEAD (ChaCha20-Poly1305, AES-GCM) with RFC8439 vectors
- Covers HKDF with RFC5869 vectors
- Covers Shamir secret sharing threshold reconstruction
- Covers X25519 key exchange with RFC7748 vectors
- Includes golden vector specifications for official test suites
- Includes JSONL logging requirements per 1n78.35

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
